{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Representative",
  "description": "Kanselor Business Innovation Campus Limited is a business operation management, market storm promotion, recruitment, product lauch and sales inventory management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Aba, Abia
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly motivated and customer-focused individual to join our team as a Customer Service Representative. The successful candidate will provide excellent customer service, handle customer inquiries, and resolve issues in a timely and professional manner.


Responsibilities


	Respond to customer inquiries via phone, email, and social media
	Resolve customer complaints and concerns in a timely and professional manner
	Provide product information and answer customer questions
	Collaborate with other teams to resolve customer issues
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions
	Meet or exceed customer satisfaction targets


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc, HND, or OND in a related field with 1-3 years of customer service experience
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
	Proficient in Microsoft Office applications


Salary
N120,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to:&nbsp;nkem.kiyix@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Customer Service Representative - Aba&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Customer Service Representative Job at Kanselor Business Innovation Campus Limited




        
    

        
        Kanselor Business Innovation Campus Limited is a business operation management, market storm promotion, recruitment, product lauch and sales inventory management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Aba, Abia
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly motivated and customer-focused individual to join our team as a Customer Service Representative. The successful candidate will provide excellent customer service, handle customer inquiries, and resolve issues in a timely and professional manner.


Responsibilities


	Respond to customer inquiries via phone, email, and social media
	Resolve customer complaints and concerns in a timely and professional manner
	Provide product information and answer customer questions
	Collaborate with other teams to resolve customer issues
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions
	Meet or exceed customer satisfaction targets


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc, HND, or OND in a related field with 1-3 years of customer service experience
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
	Proficient in Microsoft Office applications


Salary
N120,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to: nkem.kiyix@gmail.com using "Customer Service Representative - Aba" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Branding Assistant",
  "description": "OPPO, founded in 2004, is one of the world&rsquo;s leading innovators in smart devices and mobile technology. With operations in over 60 countries and regions, Dedicated to delivering cutting-edge innovation, premium user experiences, and stylish designs. OPPO continues to expand its footprint with over 290,000 points of sale and 1,900 official service centers &mdash; bringing the beauty of technology closer to people every day.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branding Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	The Branding Assistant supports branding and marketing operations by coordinating logistics, overseeing indoor and outdoor branding installations, and ensuring all marketing assets align with brand identity and safety standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate branding logistics within the Lagos region.
	Manage outdoor and indoor branding installations (billboards, wall drapes, shop heads).
	Supervise logo board and lightbox installations.
	Oversee setup of shop-in-shop displays.
	Share brand-approved images and marketing materials.
	Facilitate timely repairs of branding structures.
	Ensure all branding activities comply with company safety and quality standards.


Requirements


	BS.c / HND in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	1&ndash;2 years of experience in marketing logistics or branding support.
	Good understanding of branding installations and regional marketing coordination.
	Strong organizational and communication skills.
	Willingness to travel across Lagos as required.


Salary
N80,000 - N85,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cvpool2021@oppo-aed.ng&nbsp;usin &quot;Branding Assistant &ndash; Lagos&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",

  },

Branding Assistant Job at OPPO




        
    

        
        OPPO, founded in 2004, is one of the world’s leading innovators in smart devices and mobile technology. With operations in over 60 countries and regions, Dedicated to delivering cutting-edge innovation, premium user experiences, and stylish designs. OPPO continues to expand its footprint with over 290,000 points of sale and 1,900 official service centers — bringing the beauty of technology closer to people every day.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branding Assistant

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Branding Assistant supports branding and marketing operations by coordinating logistics, overseeing indoor and outdoor branding installations, and ensuring all marketing assets align with brand identity and safety standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate branding logistics within the Lagos region.
	Manage outdoor and indoor branding installations (billboards, wall drapes, shop heads).
	Supervise logo board and lightbox installations.
	Oversee setup of shop-in-shop displays.
	Share brand-approved images and marketing materials.
	Facilitate timely repairs of branding structures.
	Ensure all branding activities comply with company safety and quality standards.


Requirements


	BS.c / HND in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	1–2 years of experience in marketing logistics or branding support.
	Good understanding of branding installations and regional marketing coordination.
	Strong organizational and communication skills.
	Willingness to travel across Lagos as required.


Salary
N80,000 - N85,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: cvpool2021@oppo-aed.ng usin "Branding Assistant – Lagos" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
